Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class AssetTokenEvent

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.AssetTokenEvent
public class AssetTokenEvent extends SObject

Java class for AssetTokenEvent complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="AssetTokenEvent">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="ActorTokenPayload" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Asset" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Asset" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AssetId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AssetName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AssetSerialNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ConnectedApp" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ConnectedApplication" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ConnectedAppId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DeviceId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DeviceKey" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EventUuid" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Expiration" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Name" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ReplayId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="User" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
